body.title: Smoke tests: announce protocol + IMAP bus end-to-end
body.result: Verified pre-existing smoke tests pass: announce handshake (IdentityEnvelope→Manifest round-trip) and IMAP bus idle_wait both green. Tests committed in 4cfaea91. Observed one transient failure during a run with 20+ parallel pytest processes on the system; retried 6x including under load — all pass. Pre-existing test_cc1_minion failure is unrelated (missing unseen_university.test_minions module).
body.description:
Pre-Monday validation: verify the two lowest-level rack services work end-to-end. Announce protocol: agent constructs IdentityEnvelope, sends to comms://announce, receives Manifest back with bound tools. IMAP bus: message sent to a comms:// address is received by an IDLE subscriber.

**Affected files:** tests/announce/, tests/bus/ (create if missing)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; tests hit real Postgres and real IMAP (no mocks per project convention)
**Scope boundary:** IN — smoke test the happy path for announce + IMAP routing; OUT — edge cases, multi-instance, fault recovery
**Completion criteria:** pytest tests/announce/ tests/bus/ (or equivalent integration test) all green; any missing test file is created as part of this ticket
